name: Jiangsu Lidao New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Lidao New Materials Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells aluminum products in China and internationally. It offers aluminum magnesium and manganese roofing materials, color coated aluminum, and coated aluminum plates, as well as coated, embossed, and hammer aluminum rolls for use in various fields comprising construction, electronic appliances, lighting, furniture, bags, cans, and other materials. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Changzhou, China.
